load_failed_error: Failed to load catalogue source data for the series editor.
search_empty: Enter a series title or id.
missing_series_param: Search for a series by title.
new_context_loaded: Creating a draft series source record.
save_status_saving_and_updating: Saving source record and updating site…
save_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload the series before saving again.
save_result_success: Source saved at {saved_at}. Public catalogue update still pending.
save_result_success_applied: Saved source changes and updated the public catalogue at {saved_at}.
save_result_success_partial: Source changes were saved at {saved_at}, but the public update failed.
save_result_unchanged: Source already matches the current form values.
build_preview_template: Site update preview: work {work_ids}; series {series_ids}; catalogue search {search_rebuild}.
build_result_success: Public catalogue updated at {completed_at}. Studio Activity updated.
publication_status_invalid: Publication is available only for draft or published series.
publication_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before changing publication state.
unpublish_confirm_dirty_note: Unsaved form changes will be discarded.
publication_status_public_failed: Publication state changed, but the public update failed.
publication_result_public_failed: Source status changed, but public artifacts did not finish updating.
publication_result_published: Series and attached draft works are published, and public catalogue output has been updated.
publication_result_unpublished: Series is draft again and public catalogue output has been cleaned up.
publication_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before changing publication state.
create_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before creating the draft series.
create_result_success: Created draft series {series_id}. Opening edit mode...
prose_import_preview_invalid: Staged prose is not ready to import.
prose_import_confirm_overwrite: Overwrite existing prose source at {target_path} with staged file {staging_path}?
prose_import_result_success: Prose imported to {target_path} at {completed_at}. The next site update will publish it.
delete_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before deleting again.
field_required_primary_work_publish: Published series must have a primary work that belongs to this series.
field_invalid_primary_work: Primary work must be a current member of this series.
members_empty: No works currently belong to this series.
members_add_missing: Enter a work id to add.
members_add_exists: Work {work_id} is already in this series.
summary_rebuild_needed: public update failed in this session
summary_rebuild_current: source and public catalogue are aligned in this session
new_summary_next: Create the draft, then add member works, set primary_work_id, and publish when ready.
new_runtime_state: Public site update is unavailable until the draft series exists.
